name: Chicken Tandoori#1
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 pounds chicken, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken well and dry on paper towels.
2. Combine yogurt with all other spices in a bowl, mixing thoroughly.
3. Prick the chicken with a fork.
4. Place the chicken in a plastic food bag or a large glass pan big enough to hold it, and cover with the yogurt marinade, making sure all surfaces of the chicken are coated.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours, but overnight is best. Turn the chicken at least once while marinating.
6. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Place the chicken in a greased roasting pan or glass pan with the marinade.
8. Cook for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the chicken is tender and juices run clear. Cover with foil for the first part of cooking, then uncover for the last 5 minutes.
9. Serve with white rice or brown rice and condiments if desired.
CONDIMENTS: Sliced white radishes, green onions, pickles, and fresh lime wedges.
